package rulecoverage

func PositivePackageLevelMutableConfigUsedByHandlersServices() string {
    ruleID := "package_level_mutable_config_used_by_handlers_services"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Mutable package globals used as live config in request paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
